reviews.comment:
Una de las estaciones de servicio más clásicas en Mar del Plata. Suele estar muy llena los domingos y en temporada de verano. El acceso para vehículos es muy chico y desordenado a pesar de tener muchos surtidores y se debe hacer entrega la calle sobre avenida Colón en doble fila, lo que genera bastante caos de tráfico.

(Translated by Google)
One of the most classic gas stations in Mar del Plata. It's usually very crowded on Sundays and during the summer season. The vehicle access is very narrow and disorganized despite having many pumps, and you have to double-park on Avenida Colón, which causes considerable traffic chaos.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnMHBlTV9BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Vergonzoso fui a cargar combustible como lo hago en cada viaje a Mar del Plata. El termo para agua caliente roto y el Full no me quisieron dar agua me mandaban a un bar enfrente por Av. Colón a eso sumale que Domingo a las 21 hs. Sólo 3 islas habilitadas 35 minutos de espera. Desastroso!!!!!!

(Translated by Google)
It was a disgraceful experience. I went to fill up with gas, as I do every time I travel to Mar del Plata. The hot water dispenser was broken, and the gas station wouldn't give me water; they kept sending me to a bar across the street on Avenida Colón. Add to that the fact that it was Sunday at 9 PM, and only three pumps were open, resulting in a 35-minute wait. A disaster!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRdEtqSVlREAE

reviews.comment:
Rápido y completa, el servicio de aire estaba mal calibrado y cargaba unas 4 libras de más, el resto bien bien atención y servicio. Buen precio

(Translated by Google)
Quick and thorough, the air service was poorly calibrated and overinflated by about 4 pounds, otherwise excellent service and attention. Good price
